title: Poll: Most say the state of the union is not strong and the U.S. is worse off
description: Ahead of the State of the Union address on Tuesday, evidence continues to mount that President Trump is facing political headwinds.
content: Ahead of the State of the Union address on Tuesday, evidence continues to mount that President Trump is facing political headwinds.
